# graft

> A Go CLI that manages versioned, git-backed libraries of MCP (Model Context Protocol) server definitions and syncs them into Claude Code and OpenAI Codex project config files.

## Project

- **Module**: `github.com/poconnor/graft`
- **Language**: Go 1.22+
- **Binary**: `graft`
- **License**: MIT

## Purpose

graft solves the problem of keeping MCP server definitions consistent across projects and teammates. It maintains a local cache of git-cloned "libraries" containing MCP definitions, tracks which definitions each project has pinned in a `graft.lock` file, and writes the resolved configs into `.mcp.json` (Claude Code) and `.codex/config.toml` (OpenAI Codex). It detects drift when library definitions change after the last sync.

## CLI Commands

```
graft init                              Initialize graft in the current project (creates graft.lock)
graft library add <name> <url>          Clone and register a git-backed MCP library
graft library list                      List all registered libraries
graft library pull [name]               Fast-forward one or all libraries to latest
graft library show [name] [mcp]         Show library index or a single MCP definition (--tag, --json)
graft mcp import --from <file>          Import MCP definitions from an existing .mcp.json or .codex/config.toml
graft mcp add <name>                    Add a new MCP definition to the default library
graft mcp edit <name>                   Open an MCP definition in $EDITOR (defaults to pico)
graft mcp push --yes                    Reindex, commit, and push library changes to origin
graft status                            Report drift state: uninitialized|initialized|configured|drifted|pending_input|unknown_library (--quiet, --json)
graft sync                              Apply library updates to selected MCPs in the project
graft install-hooks                     Install shell cd alias and git post-checkout hook (--uninstall, --shell-rc, --git-dir)
graft pick                              Interactive TUI to browse and select MCPs from registered libraries
```

**Global flags**: `--config <path>` (config file path), `--root <dir>` (project root, default `.`)

## Internal Package Structure

| Package | Role |
|---|---|
| `cmd/` | Cobra command tree — root command, subcommands, flag wiring |
| `internal/config` | Reads and writes `~/.config/graft/config.json`; manages registered library records |
| `internal/lock` | Reads and writes `graft.lock`; tracks pinned library refs and MCP selections per project |
| `internal/library` | Git operations for library management: clone, pull, index, read definitions |
| `internal/model` | Shared domain types: `Pin`, MCP definition structs |
| `internal/pin` | Enforces reproducible version pins — validates sha512 (npm), sha256 digest (Docker), sha256 hash (uvx) |
| `internal/render` | Writes resolved MCP definitions into `.mcp.json` and `.codex/config.toml` |
| `internal/status` | Computes and reports project drift state |
| `internal/sync` | Orchestrates a full sync: resolves pins, calls render, updates lock |
| `internal/migrate` | Parses existing `.mcp.json` and `.codex/config.toml` files for import |
| `internal/hooks` | Installs and uninstalls the zshrc `cd` alias and git `post-checkout` hook |
| `internal/tui` | Bubbletea TUI model for `graft pick` — interactive MCP selection |
| `internal/fileutil` | Shared file utilities (atomic writes) |
| `features/` | Godog BDD feature specs |

## Key Files

| Path | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `~/.config/graft/config.json` | Global config (XDG-aware); lists registered libraries with name, url, cache_path |
| `<project>/graft.lock` | Per-project lock file; pins library refs and selected MCP definitions |
| `<project>/.mcp.json` | Claude Code MCP server config (written by `graft sync`) |
| `<project>/.codex/config.toml` | OpenAI Codex MCP server config (written by `graft sync`) |

## Build and Test

```bash
# Build
go build -o graft .

# Install from source
go install github.com/poconnor/graft@latest

# Unit tests
make test        # runs: go test ./...

# BDD tests (Godog)
make bdd-test

# Lint
make lint        # runs: golangci-lint run
```

## Key Dependencies

| Dependency | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `github.com/spf13/cobra` | CLI command structure and flag parsing |
| `github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea` | Terminal UI framework for `graft pick` |
| `github.com/charmbracelet/lipgloss` | TUI styling |
| `github.com/BurntSushi/toml` | Read/write `.codex/config.toml` |
| `github.com/cucumber/godog` | BDD test runner (Gherkin feature specs) |
| `go.uber.org/mock` | Mock generation for unit tests |
